title: elaphoglossum parvulum
intro: Elaphoglossum parvulum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the small elaphoglossum or small leather fern. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum parvulum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum parvulum often involve making teas or infusions from the plant's leaves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
